title: External Secrets Not Ready
description: This monitor alerts when External Secrets are in a not ready state, indicating synchronization failures.

definition.name: [External Secrets] {{name.name}} not ready in {{namespace.name}}
definition.message:
External Secret `{{name.name}}` in namespace `{{namespace.name}}` is not in Ready state.

To resolve:
1. Check the ExternalSecret status: `kubectl describe externalsecret {{name.name}} -n {{namespace.name}}`
2. Verify the referenced SecretStore is valid and ready
3. Check that the target secret exists and is accessible
